source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
READY TO CODE THE FUTURE OF US DENTAL CARE?

Teero is looking for a Full Stack Software Engineer to join our tech hub in Amsterdam. If you ship fast, build with AI, and want to launch products that transform an entire industry, we want to talk.




ABOUT TEERO

The $160B+ dental industry still runs on fax machines and phone tag—we're fixing that. We're an AI-native company building the operating system for modern dental offices, starting with staffing and expanding into revenue cycle management, patient billing, and beyond. Backed by Construct Capital with thousands of offices and hygienists using our platform monthly, we're growing fast across the country—and we're just getting started.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll work in-person from our Amsterdam tech hub, reporting directly to our co-founder, Christian. You'll be a product engineer with massive ownership—building, launching, and iterating on entirely new products, not just features. We have no product managers: you'll shape what we build and how we build it, working directly with engineering, design, founders, and customers.



We don't just use AI—it's how we build. Claude Code, Cursor, and whatever comes next aren't nice-to-haves, they're core to how we work. We expect our engineers to stay on the bleeding edge of AI-assisted development, constantly adopting new tools and techniques that let a small team ship at a pace that shouldn't be possible. If you're the kind of engineer who's already rebuilding your workflow every few months because better tools keep dropping, you'll fit right in.



This is an in-person role because the best work happens when brilliant minds collaborate face-to-face—rapid iteration, real-time problem-solving, and the kind of momentum that only comes from working side-by-side.

As Teero grows, so will you.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

 - Launch and own entire products end-to-end—from zero to live and scaling—not just tickets on a board

 - Build across our stack: React, Node.js, React Native, Temporal, PlanetScale, and AWS (TypeScript everywhere)

 - Work directly with Christian, Nate, design, and customers to shape product direction

 - Push the boundaries of AI-assisted development—we expect you to ship faster this quarter than last because your tools and workflows keep getting better

 - Make technical and product decisions that directly impact business growth and customer experience

 - Move incredibly fast while maintaining high code quality

 - Collaborate cross-functionally across our marketplace and RCM products




WHAT YOU BRING

 - Strong proficiency in full stack development and React—this shouldn't be your first engineering role, but we care more about what you can build than years on a resume

 - AI-native: you're already using Claude Code, Cursor, or similar tools daily and you'd feel slower without them

 - You launch things. You have a track record of shipping products or features from idea to production, not just contributing to existing codebases

 - Self-starter who sees problems and fixes them without waiting for permission

 - Relentlessly fast: you thrive on shipping quickly and iterating based on real user feedback

 - High standards for code quality—fast doesn't mean sloppy

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and the pace of a fast-growing startup

 - Business-minded: you understand how your technical decisions impact growth and customer experience


NICE-TO-HAVES:

 - Experience with our specific stack (React Native, Temporal, PlanetScale)

 - Startup experience in a fast-paced, high-growth environment

 - Experience working directly with founders or as a product engineer

 - Background in marketplace or healthcare tech




THIS ROLE ISN'T FOR YOU IF:

 - You prefer large, established companies with defined processes and slow release cycles

 - You're uncomfortable with ambiguity and rapid change

 - You're not excited about wearing multiple hats and doing whatever it takes

 - You prefer staying in your lane rather than collaborating d

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
READY TO SELL THE FUTURE OF US DENTAL CARE?

Teero is looking for an Account Executive to join our Austin team and drive adoption of our core product. If you're a natural on the phone, love opening doors, and want to sell something dental offices actually need, we want to talk.




ABOUT TEERO

The $160B+ dental industry still runs on fax machines and phone tag—we're fixing that. We're an AI-native company building the operating system for modern dental offices, starting with staffing and expanding into revenue cycle management, patient billing, and beyond. Backed by Construct Capital with thousands of offices and hygienists using our platform monthly, we're growing fast across the country—and we're just getting started.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll be an Account Executive, working remotely, focused on expanding our staffing platform to thousands of new customers. You'll be the first conversation offices have about Teero, many are warm inbound leads. You'll focus on understanding their pain points, qualifying them, and demoing the product.

Because we're AI-native, you'll have tools and workflows that make you wildly efficient—better data on which offices to call, when to call them, and what to say. The people who thrive in this role are the ones who combine relentless phone activity with smart, targeted outreach.

As Teero grows, so will you.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

 - Reach out to new prospects to introduce our staffing platform product

 - Understand each office's pain points and qualify them for deeper sales conversations

 - Book and queue meetings with qualified, engaged prospects

 - Build and refine outreach playbooks—sequences, talk tracks, objection handling—that make the whole team better

 - Use AI-powered tools to prioritize outreach and personalize your approach at scale

 - Partner with operations and product teams to sharpen our understanding of what offices need

 - Track and report on pipeline metrics, conversion rates, and customer feedback




WHAT YOU BRING

 - A track record of winning—this shouldn't be your first job, but we care far more about your drive than your years of experience

 - You love the phones. Not tolerate—love. You're energized by conversations and unfazed by rejection

 - Exceptional communication skills: you can explain complex products simply and build trust fast

 - Naturally curious—you ask great questions and genuinely want to understand the customer's world

 - Self-motivated and competitive: you set your own pace and it's faster than everyone else's

 - Organized and disciplined with your pipeline—you follow up relentlessly and nothing falls through the cracks

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and the pace of a fast-growing startup


IDEAL BACKGROUNDS:

 - BDR/SDR at a high-growth SaaS or marketplace company ready to move into an Account Executive role

 - Currently an Account Executive looking for a more dynamic role and company

 - Former entrepreneurs who know how to hustle and sell

 - Early-stage startup operators who've worn multiple hats

 - Anyone who's sold something and was great at it


NICE-TO-HAVES:

 - Experience selling into healthcare or dental practices

 - Familiarity with staffing software, revenue cycle management, medical billing, or insurance claims

 - Experience with CRM tools and sales automation




THIS ROLE ISN'T FOR YOU IF:

 - You're uncomfortable making a high volume of calls every day

 - You prefer inbound leads handed to you rather than building your own pipeline

 - You're not excited about wearing multiple hats and doing whatever it takes

 - You're uncomfortable with ambiguity and rapid change




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Foundational impact on how we sell

 - Be on the ground floor of our product expansion with direct impact on revenue growth

 - Direct reporting to our Head of Sales in our flat, collaborative Austin office

 - Mentorship in a no-ego startup with direct access to our founders Nate & Christian

 - Competitive salary + commission + equity tha

source_jobs.title: Operations (Associate / Manager)
source_jobs.description:
READY TO OWN AND SCALE THE FUTURE OF US DENTAL CARE?

Teero is looking for driven operators to join our Austin team and power our nationwide expansion. If you thrive on ownership, aren't afraid to pick up the phone, and want to build something extraordinary, we want to talk.




ABOUT TEERO

The $160B+ dental industry still runs on fax machines and phone tag—we're fixing that. We're an AI-native company building the operating system for modern dental offices, starting with staffing and expanding into revenue cycle management, patient billing, and beyond. Backed by Construct Capital with thousands of offices and hygienists using our platform monthly, we're growing fast across the country—and we're just getting started.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll work in-person from our Austin office as a core part of our US headquarters. You'll launch new markets, onboard dental offices, build relationships with hygienists, and drive growth and profitability across your territories.



But this isn't just a growth role. You'll be on the ground floor of expanding our product footprint, cross-selling new products into offices that already trust us for staffing. And because we're AI-native, you won't scale by throwing bodies at problems—you'll work alongside our tech team to build AI-powered workflows that let a small team operate at a scale that shouldn't be possible. The operators who thrive here are the ones who obsess over building the most efficient, most scalable version of everything they touch.



As Teero grows, so will you. We hire for this role at both the associate and manager level—placement is determined through the interview process. Either way, we're looking for adaptable A-players ready to grow with us. Top performers will gain more responsibilities, manage more territories and core processes.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

 - Full ownership of territories across the United States: growth, profitability, and strategic decisions

 - Build and maintain relationships with dental offices and hygienists via phone, video, and in person

 - Launch and scale new markets

 - Drive adoption of new Teero products within your offices—you're not just filling shifts, you're becoming their operating partner

 - Build AI-augmented processes that eliminate bottlenecks and let us grow faster than headcount—referral programs, onboarding workflows, territory dashboards, whatever it takes

 - Partner with our tech team to turn front-line insights into product and AI improvements

 - Identify new problems we can solve for dental practices and feed that back into our product roadmap




WHAT YOU BRING

 - A track record of winning in high-intensity roles—this shouldn't be your first job, but we care far more about what you've done than how long you've been doing it

 - Relentlessly competitive—you care about being #1 and hate losing

 - Exceptional communication and relationship-building skills: you're great on calls, in writing, and in person

 - Strong analytical skills—you're comfortable with numbers and see connections others miss

 - Problem-solver who handles immediate issues while building long-term solutions

 - Self-motivated and comfortable with ambiguity

 - High standards: never satisfied with "good enough"

 - Expect occasional nights and weekends during peak growth periods


NICE-TO-HAVES:

 - Experience in marketplace or staffing businesses

 - Dental industry knowledge

 - Background in entrepreneurship, early-stage startup operations, consulting, or banking




THIS ROLE ISN'T FOR YOU IF:

 - You're looking for strict work-life separation or predictable hours

 - You're uncomfortable with ambiguity and rapid change

 - You're not excited about wearing multiple hats and doing whatever it takes

 - You don't enjoy being on the phones

 - You only want remote work—this role is in-person at our Austin HQ




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Market ownership and strategic decision-making authority from day one

 - Direct reporting to our Head of Operations in our fl

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
READY TO CODE THE FUTURE OF US DENTAL CARE?

Teero is looking for a Full Stack Software Engineer to join our Austin headquarters. If you ship fast, build with AI, and want to launch products shoulder-to-shoulder with the customers who use them, we want to talk.




ABOUT TEERO

The $160B+ dental industry still runs on fax machines and phone tag—we're fixing that. We're an AI-native company building the operating system for modern dental offices, starting with staffing and expanding into revenue cycle management, patient billing, and beyond. Backed by Construct Capital with thousands of offices and hygienists using our platform monthly, we're growing fast across the country—and we're just getting started.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll be our first engineer in Austin, embedded directly with our operations team and customers at our US headquarters. This isn't a remote satellite of an engineering org—you'll be the technical co-pilot for our product expansion, building and iterating on new products in real time with the dental offices who use them.



You'll hear a customer problem in the morning and ship a fix by the afternoon. You'll sit next to the team selling and onboarding new products like revenue cycle management and patient billing, and build the AI-powered tools that help dental offices grow their revenue faster. You'll launch entirely new products from zero, with a feedback loop measured in hours, not sprints. We have no product managers: you'll shape what we build and how we build it, working directly with our operations team, founders, and the Amsterdam engineering team.

 - Make technical and product decisions that directly impact business growth and customer experience

 - You thrive on proximity to customers—you'd rather watch someone use your product and iterate on the spot than wait for a bug report

 - Self-starter who sees problems and fixes them without waiting for permission

 - Relentlessly fast: you thrive on shipping quickly and iterating based on real user feedback

 - High standards for code quality—fast doesn't mean sloppy

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and the pace of a fast-growing startup

 - Business-minded: you understand how your technical decisions impact growth and customer experience

source_jobs.title: Community Operations Associate
source_jobs.description:
READY TO BE THE FACE AND VOICE OF THE FUTURE OF US DENTAL CARE?

Teero is looking for a high-energy, people-centric Community Operations Associate to fuel our nationwide growth. If you are a natural communicator who loves building relationships, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and wants to be the heartbeat of a growing community, we want you on our team.




ABOUT TEERO

The $160B+ dental industry still runs on fax machines and phone tag—we're fixing that. Our staffing platform is growing fast across the country, and we're just getting started. Backed by Construct Capital with thousands of offices and hygienists using our platform monthly, we're expanding to become the operating system for modern dental offices.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll work in person from our Austin office as the primary point of contact for our community. As a Community Operations Associate, you are the first impression of Teero. You'll own the early customer lifecycle, onboarding new hygienists and dental offices, providing world-class support, and ensuring every member of the Teero community feels supported from day one.



This is a high-volume, high-impact role. You'll be on the front lines, identifying friction in our funnel and working with our Ops and Tech teams to turn those insights into a hyper-scaled growth engine.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

 - Be the first voice hygienists and dental offices hear, guiding them through the onboarding process with high energy and expertise

 - Act as the go-to resource for our users, solving problems in real-time and ensuring a seamless experience on the platform

 - Handle high-volume customer support across phone, email, and chat—you'll be talking to dozens of users daily

 - Identify where customers are getting stuck in the onboarding process and create solutions to get them active faster

 - Help us scale by turning one-off support wins into repeatable community playbooks

 - Collect front-line insights to help our product team build features that our community actually wants




WHAT YOU BRING

 - 1-3 years of experience where you've been in the trenches and know how to handle a fast-paced environment

 - High energy and stamina for talking to people all day—you genuinely enjoy high-volume phone and video conversations

 - Exceptional empathy: you can de-escalate a situation and turn a frustrated user into a Teero superfan

 - Communication mastery: you are clear, concise, and persuasive in speech and writing

 - Bias for action: you don't wait for a manual, you see a problem and you fix it

 - High standards: you take pride in providing a gold-standard experience for every user


NICE-TO-HAVES:

 - Experience in hospitality, retail, or customer-facing roles where you learned to read the room

 - Previous experience in a high-growth Customer Success or Community Operations role at a tech startup

 - An interest in community building and marketplace dynamics

 - Dental industry knowledge




THIS ROLE ISN'T FOR YOU IF:

 - You prefer a quiet desk job with little phone time

 - You are uncomfortable with high-volume tasks and rapid-fire problem-solving

 - You need a standard operating procedure for every single minute of your day

 - You only want remote work: this role is in-person at our US HQ in Austin




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Become the voice of our customer—your insights directly shape our product roadmap

 - Clear growth paths across Operations and Community Operations teams as we scale

 - Direct reporting to our Head of Operations in our flat, collaborative Austin office

 - Mentorship in a no-ego startup with direct access to our founders Nate & Christian

 - Competitive salary + equity that could translate into life-changing value as we grow

 - Opportunities to visit our tech team and founders in Amsterdam

 - The impact of a fast-growing startup




ABOUT THE TEAM

We're a compact, high-performing team led by co-founders Nate and Christian, former Uber executives who launched and scaled product lines

notes: AI-native company in dental industry with multiple software engineer openings
